name: Chicken and Ravioli Cacciatore
recipeIngredient: 14 1/2 oz Can diced tomatoes with garlic, undrained
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat until hot.
Add chicken, onion, and bell pepper; cook and stir until chicken is browned.
2. Stir in water, diced tomatoes with garlic, and tomato sauce.
Bring to a boil. Add ravioli, covering it with the tomato mixture.
If necessary, carefully separate ravioli.
Cook for 12 to 15 minutes or until sauce reaches desired consistency
and chicken is no longer pink, stirring frequently to prevent sticking.
Nutrition Information Per Serving:
430 Calories, 14 g Fat, 930 mg Sodium
